name: Cruelty-Free Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat the margarine or water and cook the onion for 10 minutes.
2. Add the mushrooms and cook for another 20-30 minutes, or until all the liquid has evaporated. Remove from the heat.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the cooked mushroom mixture.
4. Spoon into a serving dish and serve immediately.
Preparation time: 20 minutes
